zh.Forest Green, Denne, Gloucester, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾科華士 格林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Denne於大約1130年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾科華士 格林時，他的父親Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst44歲，母親Johanna Sybella de Gatton42歲。他和Mrs Sybella Gatton至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世在英國肯特。

zh-hans.Forest Green, Denne, Gloucester, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾科華士 格林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Denne于大约1130年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾科華士 格林时，他的父亲Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst44岁，母亲Johanna Sybella de Gatton42岁。他和Mrs Sybella Gatton至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世在英国肯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Denne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (mainly northern) and Walloon: probably a variant of Dhenne, a patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from Henne, a pet form of the personal names French Henri, Flemish Hendrik (see Henry 1). Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Daine, the feminine form of Dain .

variants.name: Denn
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Denne , a habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in Kent and Sussex with names derived from Middle English den ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English denn), such as Denne Manor in Chilham, Denne Hill in Kingston, and Denne Court in Woodnesborough (Kent); Denne Park in Horsham, Denne in Warnham, and Dann's Farm in Willingdon (Sussex).
English: possibly from a pet form of   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Denne was born about 1130, in Forest Green, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, was 44 and his mother, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, was 42. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Mrs Sybella Gatton. He died in Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Denne est né environ 1130, à Forest Green, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs Sybella Gatton. Il est décédé à Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Denne um 1130 in Forest Green, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst 44 und seine Mutter Johanna Sybella de Gatton 42. Er hatte mit Mrs Sybella Gatton mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Denne è nato il circa 1130 nel Forest Green, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Mrs Sybella Gatton. Morì nel Kent, England.

ja.Forest Green, Denne, Gloucester, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフォーエスト グレン
ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Denneが約1130年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフォーエスト グレンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Dene of Buckhurstは44歳，母Johanna Sybella de Gattonは42歳であった。彼はMrs Sybella Gattonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスケントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Denne(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 그루스스터실르 포레스트 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Sybella de Gatton(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Mrs Sybella Gatton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 켄트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Denne nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Forest Green, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Mrs Sybella Gatton. Ele faleceu em Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Denne родился около 1130 г. в местности форест грин, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Sybella de Gatton, 42. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Mrs Sybella Gatton. Он умер в местности кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Denne nació aproximadamente 1130, en Forest Green, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Mrs Sybella Gatton. Murió en Kent, Inglaterra.
